title: Where Is Baby Lily?
synopsis: Baby Lily plays peek-a-boo with her loving family members throughout the house, hiding behind colorful objects and giggling with delight as each person finds her with warm embraces and gentle sounds.

illustration.description: Baby Lily with warm brown skin and curly black hair peeks out from behind a soft yellow blanket, her bright brown eyes sparkling with joy. She wears a mint green onesie with tiny white polka dots. The nursery background features gentle pastel pink walls with simple white cloud shapes floating above.
illustration.alt: Baby Lily playing peek-a-boo with a yellow blanket

illustration.description: A loving mother with medium brown skin and long black hair pulled back in a ponytail gently lifts the yellow blanket to reveal smiling baby Lily. Both are laughing with pure joy, their faces close together. The mother wears a soft lavender sweater, and warm golden sunlight streams through a nearby window.
illustration.alt: Mama discovering baby Lily during peek-a-boo game

pages.text: Where is Lily now? Behind the teddy!

illustration.description: Baby Lily hides behind a large, fluffy brown teddy bear with a red ribbon bow. Only her tiny feet in white socks are visible peeking out from behind the bear. The scene is set on a soft cream-colored carpet with pastel blue walls and simple white furniture in the background.
illustration.alt: Baby Lily hiding behind a brown teddy bear

illustration.description: A gentle father with light brown skin and short black hair playfully tickles baby Lily as she squeals with delight. He wears a soft blue button-up shirt and has a warm smile. Baby Lily is giggling with her arms outstretched, and the teddy bear sits nearby watching the joyful interaction.
illustration.alt: Papa tickling baby Lily after finding her

pages.text: Now Lily hides! Under the table, shh!

illustration.description: Baby Lily crawls under a low wooden coffee table with rounded edges, putting her finger to her lips in a 'shh' gesture. Her eyes are bright with mischief and excitement. The living room has warm beige walls and a soft orange area rug with simple geometric patterns.
illustration.alt: Baby Lily hiding under a coffee table

pages.text: Big sister finds Lily! Clap, clap!

illustration.description: An older sister with dark skin and natural hair in two puff buns discovers baby Lily under the table. The sister, about 4 years old, wears a bright coral dress and claps her hands with excitement. Both children are beaming with happiness, and colorful building blocks are scattered on the floor around them.
illustration.alt: Big sister finding and clapping for baby Lily

pages.text: Behind the pillow! Where could she be?

illustration.description: A large, fluffy white pillow with soft pink trim sits on a comfortable sofa. Baby Lily's curly hair just barely peeks out from behind it, creating suspense in the peek-a-boo game. The sofa is sage green with gentle texture, and the background shows warm cream walls with simple framed family photos.
illustration.alt: Baby Lily hiding behind a white and pink pillow

pages.text: Grandma finds Lily! Kiss, kiss, hug!

illustration.description: A loving grandmother with silver-gray hair in a neat bun and warm dark skin holds baby Lily close, giving her gentle kisses on both cheeks. Grandma wears a soft peach cardigan, and both have expressions of pure love and contentment. The background is softly blurred with warm golden tones suggesting a cozy living space.
illustration.alt: Grandma hugging and kissing baby Lily

illustration.description: All the family members - Mama, Papa, big sister, and Grandma - sit in a cozy circle on the soft carpet with baby Lily in the center, all laughing and playing together. Everyone has their hands partially covering their faces in a group peek-a-boo gesture. The room glows with warm, golden light and radiates love and togetherness.
illustration.alt: Whole family playing peek-a-boo together with baby Lily

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is baby Lily's blanket?
questions.explanation: Baby Lily plays peek-a-boo with a soft yellow blanket at the beginning of the story.

questions.question: Who tickles baby Lily?
questions.explanation: Papa finds baby Lily behind the teddy bear and gives her tickles.

questions.question: What does the teddy bear have?
questions.explanation: The fluffy brown teddy bear that Lily hides behind has a red ribbon bow.
